items.title: NC State-Virginia Game No Longer In Brazil, Relocated To Virginia
items.summary: The Week 0 matchup between NC State and Virginia has relocated to Virginia, will no longer be held in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Spain coach expects Yamal to be fit for WC opener
items.summary: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente expects Lamine Yamal to be fit to play in the team's World Cup opener.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Title favourite Sabalenka lets another Slam opportunity slip from her grasp
items.summary: Aryna Sabalenka would not say it, but there is an inescapable feeling she has let another golden Grand Slam opportunity slip after her shock French Open loss.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
